name: codex-claude-orchestrator
description: Codex-first control-plane runtime, local MCP server, and plugin for orchestrating Claude Code, Codex, or mock agents in preview-first document workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Preview-first orchestration and MCP tools for Claude Code, Codex, and mock tasks.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-friendly control plane that packages task configs, session ledgers, preview/apply writes, validation, repair, MCP tools, release packaging, and watchdog loops around Claude Code, Codex, or mock execution.
defaultPrompt: Run the orchestration doctor and tell me which providers are available.
Use the preview-first MCP tools to run the bundled mock task and inspect the artifact.
List the recorded task sessions and explain when I should apply a preview artifact.
